params.name: Model G Loom
params.description:
On Jul 2, 1923 AD, Sakichi Toyoda earned the first bucket of gold via Model G Loom.
Model G Loom was invented by Sakichi Toyoda, the boss of the Toyoda company. Unlike previous looms, it didn't need to be operated manually, so one worker could operate 3 to 4 looms at the same time. And if the warp was broken, the loom would stop working and change the shuttle automatically. So the rate of good-quality products and efficiency were highly improved, ensuring the strong productivity of Toyoda com …
